review.reviewtitle: I didn't know this was a flash file!!!!
review.reviewbody: Since the day that I installed VirtualBox, I went to Windows XP and went to other apps that are added (such as skins, media player etc.). then i stumbled around the app known as Windows XP Tour. It showed nostalgic music. I deleted the iso due to severe lag (on a virtual machine). I went to the simulator (in web) and clicked the exact app, then the ruffle logo showed up! I thought that was an app, but it was actually ran by flash player! Thank you for archiving this!
This is not a flash animation, that's reference to Cs188.
